name: Pine House Inn
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Boutique Hospitality in the Heart of the Mountains.
description: Pine House Inn is a restored 1920s craftsman home featuring nine uniquely appointed rooms, an onsite restaurant, and walking distance to galleries, shops, and trailheads.

features.title: Historic Craftsman Architecture
features.description: Original woodwork and architectural details preserved.

features.title: Walking Distance to Everything
features.description: Steps from galleries, boutiques, and coffee shops.

features.title: Fireplace Lounge
features.description: Common area with cozy sitting room and library.
